<!-- version: v1.21.0 -->\n<!-- Update t: <!-- version: v1.21.0 --> <!-- Update this ^ to change the version number shown in the header of the `What's New` view. --> **☝️ One-click EVM network opt-in:** Easily toggle your network subscriptions on and off for enhanced performance and a tailored wallet experience. **🔎 Scan for assets:** No longer do you need to add tokens manually to your wallet. You can now automatically discover and display all tokens with balances in your wallet.
<!-- version: v1.23.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: ** AZERO.ID:** Taostats now supports resolving AZERO.ID names and addresses. ** 1-Click Copy Address:** Fast and convenient address copying. ** Improved Performance:** You'll notice the portfolio view is now extra snappy and responsive.
<!-- version: v1.23.0 -->\n\n**🪪 Azero I: <!-- version: v1.23.0 --> **🪪 Azero ID:** Taostats now supports resolving Azero.id names and addresses **✍ 1-Click Copy Address:** Fast and convenient address copying **🚀 Improved Performance:** You'll notice the portfolio view is now extra snappy and responsive
<!-- version: v1.23.0 -->\n\n**🪪 AZERO.I: <!-- version: v1.23.0 --> **🪪 AZERO.ID:** Taostats now supports resolving AZERO.ID names and addresses **✍ 1-Click Copy Address:** Fast and convenient address copying **🚀 Improved Performance:** You'll notice the portfolio view is now extra snappy and responsive
<!-- version: v1.24.0 -->\n\n**👀 Hide ba: <!-- version: v1.24.0 --> **👀 Hide balances on login:** Toggle the visibility of your balances, before you login to your account. **🔗 Links everywhere:** Block Explorer and Coingecko links are now available throughout your portfolio. **‼️ Caps lock warning:** You'll now be warned if you have caps lock enabled when creating or entering your password. **📲 Mobile friendly UI:** Taostats is now mobile responsive and will adapt to your device's screen size, allowing use in mobile browsers.
<!-- version: v1.25.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: ** Token Approval Edits:** When approving an ERC20 contract, you can now edit the token approval amount.
<!-- version: v1.26.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: ** Ethereum Risk Analysis:** Taostats now performs transaction and message analysis before signing on many EVM networks, and warns if risks are detected. ** More Fiat Currency Support:** Taostats now supports more fiat currencies, including USD, EUR, GBP, and JPY.
<!-- version: v1.28.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: **🏦 Substrate Generic Ledger:** You can now use the new Substrate Generic Ledger Application to sign transactions on the Polkadot network. **🚀 Performance Boost:** Taostats has been optimised to provide a smoother user experience, faster performance, and greater stability.
**🚀 Performance Boost:** Taostats has been optimised to provide a smoother user experience, faster performance, and greater stability.
<!-- version: v1.29.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: **🗝️ Generic Ledger app for Polkadot:** The long awaited generic Polkadot app has been released. This allows you to use one Ledger account for any Polkadot chain that supports the new standard. Taostats now supports the generic Ledger app and the migration app.
<!-- version: v1.31.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: **⚡️ Inline Nomination Pool Staking:** You can now stake in a Taostats nomination pool directly in the Wallet
<!-- version: v2.0.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🪬 Welcome to Taostats 2.0:** Taostats Wallet has been completely revamped to be more intuitive and easier to use. Your favourite Taostats features in a fresh new package.
<!-- version: v2.1.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🔏 New Polkadot Signing UI:** Taostats now shows customised and detailed information about each Polkadot transaction you're signing. **🍸 Polkadot Dry Runs:** On compatible chains, Taostats will warn you if a dry-run identifies that the transaction is likely to fail.

**🔏 New Polkadot Signing UI:** Taostats now shows customised and detailed information about each Polkadot transaction you're signing. **🍸 Polkadot Dry Runs:** On compatible chains, Taostats will warn you if a dry-run identifies that the transaction is likely to fail.

**🔏 New Polkadot Signing UI:** Taostats now shows customised and detailed information about each Polkadot transaction you're signing. **🍸 Polkadot Dry Runs:** On compatible chains, you can now preview the effects of your transaction before signing it.
<!-- version: v2.10.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: **🔓 Ledger Polkadot secp256k1 support:** Sign with Ledger Polkadot app on Mythos. **💰 Bittensor staking validator picker:** Display Validator's estimated rewards for selected subnet.
<!-- version: v2.11.0 -->\n\n**<span cla: **🤝 StealthEX Swaps:** Added StealthEX as an additional swaps provider. **🥼 Send Funds Dry Runs:** Send tokens with confidence! Send funds transactions are now tested for validity via a dry run, prior to submission.
<!-- version: v2.2.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **𝛕 Bittensor TAO Staking:** Taostats now supports Bittensor TAO staking directly in the Wallet. **🔎 Asset Discovery Improvements:** Asset Discovery now automatically adds discovered assets, and multiple asset scans can be queued.
<!-- version: v2.3.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **📈 Price changes:** Taostats now shows charts for the price of tokens in your portfolio, and indicators for 24hr price changes.
<!-- version: v2.4.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🛹 On and Off Ramps:** In partnership with Ramp, Taostats now offers a safe and convenient feature to buy and sell crypto assets.
**🛹 On and Off Ramps:** In partnership with Ramp, Taostats now offers an easy way to buy and sell crypto assets.
<!-- version: v2.5.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🏡 Dual address formats:** For Polkadot networks, you have the option of copying either the unified or legacy address formats for parachains.

**📤 Export all accounts:** You can now export all your accounts into a convenient JSON to transfer your Taostats wallet to a new device. **🏡 Dual address formats:** For Polkadot networks, you have the option of copying either the unified or legacy address formats for parachains.
<!-- version: v2.6.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🪙 TAO subnet staking balances:** Display dTAO balances on the portfolio TAO details page.
**🪙 TAO Subnet Staking Balances:** dTAO balances are now shown in your portfolio on the TAO details page.
<!-- version: v2.8.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **💳 Coinbase Onramp:** Instantly fund your wallet with crypto via Coinbase. **🤝 Swaps:** Trade tokens on the fly using Taostats’s built-in swaps.
<!-- version: v2.9.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🪙 TAO Subnet Staking:** Participate in dTAO staking directly from your wallet. **💰 TAO Portfolio:** You can now view your portfolio holdings in TAO instead of USD. Enable it in `Settings -> General -> Currency`.
<!-- version: v3.0.0 -->\n\n**<span clas: **🎉 Solana support:** Add or import Solana accounts, and connect to dapps. **⚡️ Defi Position:** Browse DeFi positions of your Ethereum and Solana accounts.

Choose the Migration App if you want to access an existing account that was previously created with the chain-specific {{chainName}} app. The purpose of the Migration app is to allow you to migrate your funds to the new generic Polkadot App.

Polkadot Vault requires that the specifi: Polkadot Vault requires that the specification and the metadata for each chain are signed with a 'Verifier Certificate'. Taostats can generate its own Verifier Certificate from a mnemonic, enabling you to add networks and update metadata on your Polkadot Vault device without needing to trust an external source. If you prefer to use an external Verifier Certificate, you can use the Parity or Nova Wallet metadata sources, simply by selecting "Don't use a Verifier Certificate Mnemonic" below.

The validator's public key for the next: The validator's public key for the next block is embedded in the encrypted payload, so the transaction is only valid for that single block. This makes it too time-sensitive for hardware wallets, so MEV Shield is disabled when using one.
